caption: In a professional studio setting with a dark background and purple lighting accents, three people sit in gold-framed chairs on a stage. On the left, a man wearing a white button-down shirt and dark trousers gestures with his hands; in the second and third frames, he holds a small, glowing pink spherical object. In the center, a woman with blonde hair pulled back wears a black t-shirt and black trousers, sitting with her hands folded in her lap. To the right, a man in a grey suit and light blue shirt sits with his legs crossed. Between the man in white and the woman is a large, white, rectangular technical device with intricate mechanical details and the letters "U" and "E" visible on its side. In the background, a red logo featuring the letters "BL" is partially visible. The scene remains mostly static as the man on the left interacts with the pink object.
